commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=ce13aa2f736fb00467fd4f1ca2c61e25209cc7c1)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds runtime conversation-binding target validation, stale-binding unbinds, cleanup-time unbinds for removed session keys, and focused routing/cleanup tests.

PR surface: Source +111, Tests +88. Total +199 across 4 files.

Reproducibility: yes. source-level: current main preserves agent-scoped placeholder rows and materializes them later, while the PR validator treats rows without sessionId as absent. I did not run a live gateway/channel reproduction in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Manual review is needed because the external PR lacks real behavior proof, is conflicting, and has session-state repair choices that should not be routed to automated repair while contributor proof is missing.

target.title: Drop stale conversation session bindings
target.body:
Fixes #77871.

## Summary
- validate runtime conversation binding targets before touching or rewriting routes
- unbind stale runtime targets and fall back to the original route
- unbind conversation bindings for session keys removed by applied session cleanup
- keep dry-run cleanup read-only

## Verification
- `PATH="/tmp/openclaw-pnpm-shim:$PATH" node scripts/test-projects.mjs src/channels/plugins/binding-routing.test.ts src/config/sessions/store.pruning.integration.test.ts src/infra/outbound/session-binding-service.test.ts src/commands/sessions-cleanup.test.ts --maxWorkers=1`
- `git diff --check`

## Known unrelated blocker
- `PATH="/tmp/openclaw-pnpm-shim:$PATH" node scripts/check-changed.mjs` currently fails in the extension typecheck lane on `extensions/codex/src/app-server/run-attempt.ts(19,3): Module "openclaw/plugin-sdk/agent-harness-runtime" has no exported member "resolveAgentDir"`. This branch does not touch Codex harness exports.
target.author: bryce-d-greybeard

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
